title: minimum memory lower than 4m
body:
### Feature request description

[crun](https://github.com/containers/crun) describes:

```
# podman --runtime /usr/bin/runc run --rm --memory 4M fedora echo it works
Error: container_linux.go:346: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:327: getting pipe fds for pid 13859 caused \"readlink /proc/13859/fd/0: no such file or directory\"": OCI runtime command not found error

# podman --runtime /usr/bin/crun run --rm --memory 4M fedora echo it works
it works
```
crun could go much lower than that, and require < 1M. The used 4MB is a hard limit set directly in Podman before calling the OCI runtime.


### Suggest potential solution

can this 4m please be reduced?

comments.body:
Do you want the line just removed?

Care to open a PR?

We do not set this limit for a very long time so the crun readme should be updated https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/4722

cc @giuseppe 

```
$ podman run --memory 500kb quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 echo hi
hi
$ podman run --memory 200kb quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 echo hi
<-- exit code 137 (kernel oom killer killed the process)
```

So this definitely works already, if you go even lower crun will fail

```
$ podman run --memory 100kb quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 echo hi
Error: OCI runtime error: crun: the memory limit could be too low: read from the init process
```
